default_binding.DEADLINE: the tide turns and comes back in
default_binding.DEADLINE_SIGN: the sparkling sea turning around to come home
default_binding.Q1_PLIGHT: stranded on a bare high ledge
default_binding.Q1_METHOD: wet his hands and slide her down
default_binding.Q1_ATTEMPT1: toss water up to her with cupped hands
default_binding.Q1_ATTEMPT2: carry the full bucket up the little slope
default_binding.Q2_PLIGHT: trapped in a shrinking sun-warmed puddle
default_binding.Q2_METHOD: dip the bucket and scoop him up together
default_binding.Q2_ATTEMPT1: try to catch him with his bare hands
default_binding.Q2_ATTEMPT2: dig a little river through the sand
default_binding.Q3_PLIGHT: tangled up in slippery seaweed ribbons
default_binding.Q3_HOME: the cool pool beside the seaweed
default_binding.Q3_METHOD: untangle one ribbon at a time, slowly
default_binding.Q3_ATTEMPT1: give the seaweed one quick tug
default_binding.Q3_ATTEMPT2: hold out the spoon for him to grab
default_binding.Q4_PLIGHT: stranded far up a sunny dry rock
default_binding.Q4_HOME: her cool pool down the rock
default_binding.Q4_METHOD: offer her a slow ride on his palm
default_binding.Q4_ATTEMPT1: roll her along like a tiny wheel
default_binding.Q4_ATTEMPT2: cheer her on to walk faster
default_binding.Q4_SIGN: something tiny gleaming in the sunshine
default_binding.BONUS1_FIND: a hermit crab in a curly borrowed shell
default_binding.BONUS2_FIND: a perfect shell striped like a peppermint

slots.meaning: The child protagonist doing the rescuing.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable child; kind, capable, and never worried.

slots.meaning: The trusted grown-up who watches over the hero and offers tips.
slots.guidance: A warm, patient adult who stays at the base and only ever helps; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, explorable place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: A safe, self-contained outdoor place revealed by the opening moment; wonder over dread; no hazards.

slots.meaning: The single safe home base the hero returns to for tips and to celebrate.
slots.guidance: Always reachable, always safe; where the companion waits and watches.

slots.meaning: A short, one-to-two-word name for the setting, used in titles and short references.
slots.guidance: The plain short noun for the whole setting; safe, wondrous, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The small carried object the hero uses across every rescue.
slots.guidance: A harmless handheld container or carrying tool a child could plausibly carry.

slots.meaning: The companion's recurring headwear, mentioned at several points.
slots.guidance: A warm, ordinary piece of the companion's clothing; purely decorative.

slots.meaning: The companion's spread-out towel or blanket at the home base.
slots.guidance: A cozy, ordinary piece of the companion's gear; a place to sit and be wrapped up warm.

slots.meaning: The shared food container opened for the celebration.
slots.guidance: A simple, shareable food container; a treat, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The recurring, non-lethal condition that makes the adventure possible.
slots.guidance: A repeatable, safe natural window; must read as something that happens again, so 'come back next time' is true.

slots.meaning: The non-lethal, survivable process that eventually closes the safe window.
slots.guidance: A gentle, expected turning point; never a source of danger, only a reason to hurry a little.

slots.meaning: The sensory sign the deadline is on its way, seen early in the story.
slots.guidance: A visible, gradual, gentle cue; gives fair warning without ever feeling scary.

slots.meaning: A short, one-to-two-word name for the returning force/water, reused throughout and in titles.
slots.guidance: A friendly, short name for the thing that is coming back; never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The first rescued creature's personal name.
slots.guidance: A short, friendly, kid-relatable name.

slots.meaning: The first rescued creature's species or type.
slots.guidance: A small, gentle, benign creature; never predatory or frightening.

slots.meaning: Where and how the first creature is stranded.
slots.guidance: A mild, non-scary stranding; uncomfortable, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The first creature's safe destination.
slots.guidance: A cool, safe, welcoming spot the creature belongs in.

slots.meaning: The gentle, correct technique that rescues the first creature.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe, caring action a child could actually do.

slots.meaning: The first creature's first well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The first creature's second well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The second rescued creature's personal name.
slots.guidance: A short, friendly, kid-relatable name.

slots.meaning: The second rescued creature's species or type.
slots.guidance: A small, gentle, benign creature; never predatory or frightening.

slots.meaning: Where and how the second creature is stranded.
slots.guidance: A mild, non-scary stranding; uncomfortable, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The second creature's safe destination.
slots.guidance: A cool, safe, welcoming spot the creature belongs in.

slots.meaning: The gentle, correct technique that rescues the second creature.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe, caring action a child could actually do.

slots.meaning: The second creature's first well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The second creature's second well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The sensory cue that draws the hero toward the second creature.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sound or sight; distinguishable from the other creatures' cues.

slots.meaning: The third rescued creature's personal name.
slots.guidance: A short, friendly, kid-relatable name.

slots.meaning: The third rescued creature's species or type.
slots.guidance: A small, gentle, benign creature; never predatory or frightening.

slots.meaning: Where and how the third creature is stranded.
slots.guidance: A mild, non-scary stranding; uncomfortable, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The third creature's safe destination.
slots.guidance: A cool, safe, welcoming spot the creature belongs in.

slots.meaning: The gentle, correct technique that rescues the third creature.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe, caring action a child could actually do.

slots.meaning: The third creature's first well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The third creature's second well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The sensory cue that draws the hero toward the third creature.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sound or sight; distinguishable from the other creatures' cues.

slots.meaning: The fourth rescued creature's personal name.
slots.guidance: A short, friendly, kid-relatable name.

slots.meaning: The fourth rescued creature's species or type.
slots.guidance: A small, gentle, benign, slow-moving creature; never predatory or frightening.

slots.meaning: Where and how the fourth creature is stranded.
slots.guidance: A mild, non-scary stranding; uncomfortable, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The fourth creature's safe destination.
slots.guidance: A cool, safe, welcoming spot the creature belongs in.

slots.meaning: The gentle, correct technique that rescues the fourth creature.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe, caring action a child could actually do; unhurried.

slots.meaning: The fourth creature's first well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The fourth creature's second well-meaning but ineffective rescue attempt.
slots.guidance: A harmless, comic near-miss; nobody and nothing is ever hurt.

slots.meaning: The sensory cue that reveals the fourth creature.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sight or sound; distinguishable from the other creatures' cues.

slots.meaning: The extra, already-safe creature discovered on the bonus branch.
slots.guidance: A benign small creature that needs no rescue at all; purely a happy surprise.

slots.meaning: The extra keepsake object discovered on the bonus branch.
slots.guidance: A small, harmless, pretty found object; a keepsake, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending: the deadline itself finishes the remaining rescues after the first (neutral setback). Names ending e_tide_star.
slots.guidance: Light, reassuring, neutral setback title; nobody is hurt and nothing is truly lost.

slots.meaning: Ending: the deadline finishes the fourth rescue after the first three succeed (neutral setback). Names ending e_tide_snail.
slots.guidance: Light, reassuring, neutral setback title; nobody is hurt and nothing is truly lost.

slots.meaning: Ending: the first creature's own thank-you celebration (success). Names ending e_cartwheel.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, joyful completion title celebrating the first rescued creature.

slots.meaning: Ending: racing the returning water up the sand for fun (success). Names ending e_race_win.
slots.guidance: Positive, playful, energetic completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: discovering the already-safe bonus creature (discovery). Names ending e_hermit.
slots.guidance: Positive, gentle, wondrous discovery title.

slots.meaning: Ending: discovering the bonus keepsake object (discovery). Names ending e_shell.
slots.guidance: Positive, gentle, wondrous discovery title.

slots.meaning: Ending: recounting the whole rescue day as a story (completion). Names ending e_story.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, tradition-honoring completion title.

slots.meaning: Ending: planning the next rescue outing together (success). Names ending e_patrol.
slots.guidance: Positive, warm, forward-looking completion title.
